_comment: Search query fixtures for 16-search-quality.cli-e2e.test.ts. Edit queries here to tune what each test searches for — no TypeScript changes needed.
_comment_ai: Queries that benefit from AI-powered intent classification over heuristics. These are natural-language questions where regex patterns won't fire but an LLM would correctly route to 'both' or 'metadata'.

aiAssisted.pluginByDescription: which sites have a form builder
aiAssisted.versionByContext: find sites running an older PHP version
aiAssisted.contentOrPlugin: how is WooCommerce being used across my sites
aiAssisted.semanticMetadata: show me sites that are likely e-commerce
aiAssisted.ambiguousIntent: ACF field groups and custom post types
aiAssisted.contextualVersion: sites that might need a PHP upgrade
